Messaging Framework

How we set direction, how we say it, and how we bring people with us.

Member FDIC· Founded 1856, Buffalo NY· $213B in assets· 22,000+ colleagues· 900+ branches across 12 states & DC
Our North Star

The bank that earns its way in, and the right to stay

The Operating Sentiment

We earn our way in through presence, discipline, and continuity. And we earn the right to stay by building trust and deepening relationships, so that staying with M&T always feels like the obvious choice, never the default one.

We build trust by being worth choosing, attentive, responsive, and genuinely working alongside our customers, and we keep it by being strong enough to keep our word.  That trust is the main reason we earn our way in, and the right to stay. The deepest client relationships in banking are also the most profitable, most resilient, and hardest to replicate. That is how the business model works, and it is why we win.

Purpose to Vision to North Star

One focus, set by a series of distinct statements

The purpose anchors. The vision aspires. The North Star sets direction and the daily operating standard. The customer always remains at the center.

Purpose

Why we exist

To make a difference in people's lives, by knowing them, growing with them, and connecting them with everything they need to thrive.

Vision

The future we're building for

To be the bank invited into homes, businesses, and communities, by earning trust and deepening relationships with every interaction.

North Star

How we get there

The bank that earns its way in, and the right to stay.

Operational Commitment to Our Customers

How the relationship shows up

We anticipate what they need and show up proactively, with the right expertise, so customers feel confident their money is safe and certain someone has their back.

Knows you

"We know you because we're part of your community."
  • Decisions made locally, by people who live where you do.
  • Our Regional President model means we understand the businesses, institutions, and economics of every community we serve.
  • Customers feel known and supported: the confidence of a larger bank with the comfort of a smaller one.
FocusDeepening relationships in the markets we serve.

Grows with you

"We grow with you, at every stage of your life and your business."
  • One relationship grows across Retail, Commercial, and Wealth, so you're never starting over as needs get more complex.
  • A first account can grow into a lifetime, multi-generation relationship.
  • Through Wilmington Trust, families and institutions gain specialized capabilities that extend globally.
FocusBringing the full bank to every customer through Teaming for Growth.

Shows up when it matters

"We show up in good times and hard ones."
  • A deliberate, steady approach rooted in the fundamentals of banking, so customers can count on us across cycles.
  • Our edge is credit quality: a long record of lower credit losses than peers.
  • We build technology in service of the relationship, not as a substitute for it, so the people who bank with us never wonder whether we'll be here when it's hard.
FocusBeing there proactively so customers feel someone has their back.

Builds for the long term

"The relationships we start today still matter decades from now."
  • Customers experience M&T as one bank and one relationship: deeper for them, more durable for us.
  • A bank built to endure and to be invited in for generations, with relationships that compound over time.
  • We earn our way in by showing up for customers in the ways that matter most.
FocusInvesting in people and technology so relationships keep compounding.
Brand Pillars

Grounded in your life, proactive about your future, and relevant to what you're building

Four attributes that describe what the brand is and define how M&T is meant to feel to a customer.

Trusted Foundation

  • Reliable
  • Transparent
  • Values-Aligned

Financial Expertise

  • Integrated

Authentic Relationship

Seamless Experience

  • Accessible
  • Empowering
The Standard We Hold Ourselves To

Our Values

Five values shape how we work with each other. The same five shape how we show up for the customer.

Integrity

We earn the trust of clients and communities through the same consistency we show each other.

Curiosity

We listen to understand what clients actually need, not what we assume they need.

Candor

We tell clients what they need to hear, not just what they want to hear, and we do it with care.

Ownership

We take responsibility for better client outcomes, not just completed transactions.

Collaboration

We bring the whole bank to every relationship, so no client is limited by where they started.

Investing Where We Live and Work

A bank for communities

We know who we are: a bank committed to the individualized, relationship-driven model that sets M&T apart from other banks our size. Our approach is flexible, but our values are unchanging. M&T is a bank for communities, a true engine for local economic development and relationship building.

We earn trust by showing up in every community we serve, in person, on the ground, as one team, because when our communities succeed, we succeed. As we've grown, we've had the privilege of serving more and more communities, always keeping that same commitment in mind.

Community Proof Points

How we know it's true

Prioritizing our communities' long-term health and longevity. In 2024, the commitment showed up in the numbers.

$2.8B

In financing to community-centric projects that include affordable housing.

$67M+

In total community impact, helping more than 4,006 nonprofit organizations in our communities.

$609.6M

In loans and investments to initiatives like renewable energy.

Outstanding

The highest possible Community Reinvestment Act rating, awarded by the Federal Reserve Bank on every exam since 1982.

Top SBA

Lender in the communities we serve, and the top SBA lender nationally since 2009.

245,000

Hours of colleague volunteerism, with 40 hours of paid volunteer time provided to every colleague.

the relationship is the advantage

Everyone can build an app. No one can fake the relationship.

Every bank now has the technology, the products, and the convenience that once set competitors apart. What cannot be copied is a relationship that has compounded over years. What a relationship means keeps evolving, and digital is now part of it, but relationships have never mattered more, and M&T's have never been deeper.

This is evolution, not reinvention. As digital capabilities become baseline expectations, the advantage shifts to the banks customers actually trust. We built M&T this way on purpose. The relationship model we have always believed in matters more now than it ever has.  The foundation holds, we earn our way in and we earn the right to stay, and the work ahead is to carry it to a new generation on the terms they expect.

Why Now

Four signals say the next primary-bank relationships are being decided now, not in the next cycle. Together they define the opportunity, and the urgency, behind how we act.

$84T
Inheritance wave transferring from Boomers to the next generation over 20 years. Those customers are choosing their primary bank now.
34% / 16%
Share of M&T customers 65-plus versus under 35. Peers like Bank of America run 25 percent under 35.
2×
Switching risk for under-35 customers, 16 percent versus 8 percent for those over 35. Loyalty is still forming.
82%
Of Millennials would consider Wilmington Trust for wealth, against 25 percent awareness today. The demand is there to earn.

Sources: Bain NPS Prism Q3 2025; Cerulli and BCG 2025; internal M&T customer analysis.

Wilmington Trust

Diversified, high-quality driver of growth

Wilmington Trust is a diversified fee business that grows with our clients' assets and the market. It become a meaningful share of the bank's fee income. We integrate with M&T to unlock the full potential of our offerings, matching local insight with enterprise scale and digital investments so we grow while deepening relationships.

Wealth Management

The destination of the relationship arc

Where the M&T relationship compounds.
  • The business owner a commercial banker serves for twenty years; the liquidity event that turns an operator into an investor.
  • It compounds what the rest of the bank creates, and grows fastest where M&T's commercial relationships run deepest.
  • An advisor-led platform combining institutional-quality investment access with personalized advice and multigenerational commitments.
Institutional Services

That stand on their own

Scale and fee income M&T would not otherwise reach.
  • Wins corporate trust, agency, and global capital markets mandates on specialized expertise and a reputation earned across markets.
  • Clients are choosing fewer, stronger partners, and our scale and trusted expertise win the mandate.
  • Brings scale, fee income, and corporate connections that deepen alongside M&T's own franchise.
50 states served

Plus offices in London, Dublin, and Frankfurt. An institutional footprint few regional banks can match.

Fiduciary heritage

Founded in 1903, and maintaining the same fiduciary philosophy, serving the most sophisticated needs and the most important decisions our clients will ever make.

A steadier share of earnings

Diversified, capital-efficient fee business. $1.10B revenue, $67M fee income, $19B in deposits, and $4B in loans for combined Wealth + Institutional Services in FY 2025.

M&T gives Wilmington Trust scale, liquidity, and a commercial franchise that feeds the wealth pipeline. In return, it gains deep fiduciary expertise, a path into the growing high-net-worth market, and an institutional footprint few regional banks can match.

Each makes the other stronger, and together they are more complete than either would be alone.

Where we comPete

How we win

How M&T operates

Relationship-first, held through cycles

  • Relationship depth before product sale
  • Earned trust across cycles, not borrowed in good times
  • Fiscal discipline as a competitive stance
  • Community presence operating with conviction, and local knowledge
How most banks operate

Product-first, optimized for volume

  • Product-led acquisition and rate competition
  • Volume-driven growth targets
  • Brand awareness as a substitute for earned trust
  • National scale with localized execution

Customers no longer choose one bank. Only one relationship is primary, and primary status is decided by trust, not by rate or features alone. Three kinds of competitor are fighting for it.

National Scale Banks
The largest incumbents
What they promise

Everything to everyone.

Why we win

We match them on presence in the markets we serve and win on intimacy, making decisions locally, in the customer's interest by people with the authority to say yes, not routed through a call center or an AI.

Neobanks & Fintechs
Digital-first challengers
What they promise

To be instant, invisible, and mobile-first.

Why we win

They solve for a specific need; we solve for the whole customer. We win the decisions that carry risk, because trust is built at moments of friction, not convenience, and we show up, across the table,  when the stakes are real.

Regional & Community Banks
Our closest peers
What they promise

Local connection, trust, and the sense that they know you.

Why we win

We deliver against that claim and add the strength they lack: the balance sheet to keep lending through a cycle, and the capability to grow with a customer to build deeper and longer lasting relationships.

Why M&T

M&T alone pairs the strength of a national bank with the intimacy of a local one, so customers grow their whole financial life in one place, from first job to business to wealth. Everyone can build an app. No one can fake the relationship.

Not by being the biggest or the newest, but by being the bank clients choose to go deeper with, and stay with, when everyone else is offering the same thing.

170 yrs
Of proven track record, delivering security and peace of mind in every economic environment.
$213B
In assets and a resilient balance sheet, so people who bank with us never wonder if we'll be here when it's hard.
Leading SBA
Lender, backing the small businesses that build the communities we serve.
Friction
Is where trust is built or lost. Convenience is expected; the hard moments are where we earn the right to stay.
Our Future

Growth engines

How we earn the invitation and the right to stay.

Organic Growth

Deepen first

The cheapest customer to grow is the one we already serve well.
  • Teaming for Growth brings the full bank to every customer, deepening the relationships and communities we already serve.
  • Win the next generation early and keep them through every life stage, so acquisition cost is recovered over decades, not quarters.
  • Local knowledge at scale drives compounding value for the bank and the communities we serve.
  • Hold credit and pricing discipline so organic growth is profitable growth, not volume we regret.
Inorganic Growth

Buy what is hard to build

Acquire capability and customers we could not reach in time on our own.
  • Integration capability is proven: roughly 92% of branches came through M&A, with relationship duration intact.
  • Favor capability and relevance over scale for its own sake. Inorganic growth improves cost efficiency but does not, by itself, address relevance.
  • Buy our way to customers who are hard to earn organically: a generation, a segment, or a market without a natural foothold.
  • Underwrite every deal to the same test as a loan: does it make us more useful to customers?
Earning the Next Generation

Win them early, keep them for life

The same architecture holds: we earn our way in and we earn the right to stay. What changes is when we start and how we keep pace, across three horizons.

Now

Earn the relationship earlier

We meet the next generation where they already are, the first-job saver, the side-hustle owner, the heir taking over a family business, and make beginning a relationship as fast as the platforms they use today, so trust starts before their financial life hardens elsewhere.

Next

Deepen as their lives grow

We connect the moments that compound: a first account becomes a mortgage, a business loan, a wealth relationship, so a customer never has to leave us to grow up.

Future

Build for who they become

We invest ahead of the curve in the capabilities the next generation will expect by default, so those capabilities are part of how we work, and the relationship outlasts the technology that started it.

The Balance

Growth aligned to our North Star

Organic & inorganic

We grow organically by deepening trust and inorganically by buying capability we cannot build in time. We never buy scale we cannot underwrite or import a risk we cannot defend.

Digital & human

Customers judge us against every app they use, not just other banks. Digital is where the everyday bar is set and reset. Human is where we win the moments that carry risk. Our model is hybrid by design: a journey that can start on a phone and finish in a conversation, or the reverse, without ever missing a beat.

Scale & intimacy

The full capabilities of a large bank with the local knowledge of a neighborhood one. We are large enough to give customers everything they need, and personal enough that it never feels that way.

Key Messages & Positioning

One bank, three constituents

A bank is the most personal business there is. People hand us the things they worry about, and they trust us to act like it matters. Everything we're building comes down to being worth that trust, then being strong enough to keep earning it across a lifetime. The same strategic direction, the same posture and accountability. The words shift for who's listening; the strategy doesn't.

To Our People

The people who are the bank

Our people are how customers experience M&T, so we invest in them above almost anything else. When we hold that line, growth follows.

  • Ask the same question of every decision: does this deepen the relationship and make it more valuable over time?
  • You are how customers experience M&T. Use your judgment to do right by them.
  • We're not the biggest, and we won't win by pretending to be. We win by being the bank people recommend to someone they trust.
  • Tell us what's broken. Candor is how we get better, and it's one of our values for a reason.
To Our Shareholders

Those who invest in us

M&T is a consistently high-performing bank, with credit that holds steadier than peers across cycles. That stability protects the balance sheet and lets us keep lending when other banks pull back.

  • We manage this bank for the long term, not the next quarter, because a relationship earned young and kept for life is the most durable growth there is.
  • Discipline is not caution. It's the habit that lets us keep lending when weaker competitors pull back.
  • We'll grow two ways: organically by deepening trust, and by acquiring capability we cannot build in time. Never scale we cannot underwrite.
  • Judge us on consistent top-quartile returns and relationships that compound across generations.
To Our Customers

The people and businesses we serve

Large-bank capability with a local heart: the technology, services, and stability of the largest banks, paired with the personalized experience of a bank that knows its community.

  • We work for you. Decisions are made locally, by people who live and work where you do.
  • We'll meet you on your phone for the everyday and be there in person for the decisions that keep you up at night. You should never have to choose between fast and human.
  • We grow when you grow. The account you open today should still fit when you buy a home, start a business, or pass something on.
  • And when times are hard, we'll still be here. Anyone can be your bank when it's easy. We intend to be the one that stays.
M&T Bank · Wilmington Trust · Messaging Framework · Confidential
Earning our way in, and the right to stay.

Messaging Placemats

WORKING DRAFT
M&T Bank Corp Message House

We make a difference in people's lives

by knowing them, growing with them, and connecting them with everything they need to thrive
M&T is a bank for communities: the full capabilities of a large financial services company with the local knowledge of a neighborhood bank. Our vision is to be the bank invited into homes, businesses, and communities, earning trust and deepening relationships with every interaction.

Knows you

"We know you because we're part of your community."
  • Decisions made locally, by people who live where you do.
  • We understand the businesses, institutions, and economics of every community we serve, so you get better advice, faster decisions, and access to capital where it's needed.
  • Customers feel known and supported, with the confidence of a larger bank and the comfort of a smaller one.
Focus: Deepening relationships in the markets we serve.

Grows with you

"We grow with you, at every stage of your life and your business."
  • One relationship grows with you across Retail, Commercial, and Wealth, so you're never starting over as your needs get more complex.
  • We bring the right expertise and advice for where you are right now, so growing with you means staying a step ahead.
  • A first account can grow into a lifetime, multi-generation relationship. Through Wilmington Trust, families and institutions benefit from their specialized capabilities.
Focus: Bringing the full bank to every customer through Teaming for Growth.

Shows up when it matters

"We show up when it matters, in good times and hard ones."
  • A deliberate, steady approach rooted in the fundamentals of banking, so customers can count on us across market cycles.
  • Our edge is credit quality: a long record of lower credit losses than peers through past cycles.
  • We invest in technology with precision and discipline, so customers feel the relationship through better tools and experiences.
Focus: Showing up proactively with the right expertise so customers feel confident their money is safe and someone has their back.

Builds for the long term

"We build for the long term, so the relationships we start today still matter decades from now."
  • Customers experience M&T as one bank and one relationship, making their connection to M&T deeper for them and more durable for us.
  • Our bank built to endure and to be invited in for generations, with relationships that compound over time.
  • We earn our way in by showing up for customers in the ways that matter most.
Focus: Investing in our people and technology so the relationships we build keep compounding for generations.
How we earn the invitation and the right to stay

Teaming for Growth brings the full bank to every customer, driving organic growth;

Operational Excellence delivers industry-leading service, value and simplified operations, enabling us to achieve scale and create a differentiated client experience.

Proof

Among the top 3 banks in the Northeast by branch network, with a leading presence in the core markets we serve.

Proof

Founded in 1856, M&T has built relationships that last generations, our long-term competitive advantage.

Proof

An "outstanding" CRA rating, the highest possible, from the Federal Reserve on every exam since 1982.

Proof

Technology investment nearly tripled since 2017, including a tech hub in Buffalo with about 2,000 technologists building ahead for customers.

The Foundation

Our people and communities. Our people are how customers experience M&T, so we invest in them above almost anything else. We earn trust by showing up in every community we serve, because when our communities succeed, we succeed.

ELT – Key Messaging

ELT Core Messages

Who we are
  • M&T is a bank for communities: the full capabilities of a large financial services company with the local knowledge of a neighborhood bank. Our relationships, with clients and communities alike, set us apart.
  • We are a large regional bank with more than $200 billion in assets that operates in states across the eastern U.S. Through Wilmington Trust, we serve wealth, institutional, and corporate clients nationally, with specialized capabilities that extend globally.

People & Communities At Our Core

We make a difference in people's lives by knowing them, growing with them, and connecting them with everything they need to thrive.
  • Everything we do is guided by our purpose: to make a difference in people's lives.
  • Our people, rooted in the communities we serve, are how customers experience M&T, so we invest in them above almost anything else.
  • Improving the customer experience is part of the culture we have built: our people look for ways to improve so we can continue to make a difference.
  • We've always believed we have a role to play in helping the people and places we serve do well, through the capital and advice we provide and the way we give back to and advocate for the communities we call home.
  • The partnership between M&T and the communities we serve is an important one, and when they do well, we do well.
  • We are disciplined by design with a deliberate, steady approach that shows up for customers in good times and more challenging ones.
Where We Are Going
We earn trust by showing up and building deep relationships in the communities we serve. When they succeed, we succeed.

How We Grow

We deepen financial relationships across every community we call home, on a foundation built to move customers' lives forward at every stage.
  • Long-term relationships and local expertise build the most durable, hardest-to-replicate relationships in banking. Growth is driven by relentless focus on customers, talent and delivering innovative capabilities.
  • We are large enough to have the resources and products customers need, and personal enough to keep the culture that got us here.
  • Our relationships with our clients and our communities are what set us apart, and they are our organizing logic and how we win.
  • Operational Excellence: operations designed around the customer, with shared standards across the bank, mean customers get industry-leading service at scale.
Where We Are Going
Our growth strategy is rooted in the belief that local knowledge at scale compounds value for customers and for the bank.

The Relationship Model In Action

We create responsive relationships grounded in what customers are building, providing access to the capital, expertise, and relationships that help them grow.
  • Our same relationship-based model runs through all three businesses, which is how a first account can grow into a lifetime, multi-generation relationship.
  • Commercial: clients choose M&T for the relationship and the depth of advice it brings.
  • Retail: customers feel known and supported, with the confidence of a large bank and the comfort of a smaller one.
  • Wealth & institutional: through Wilmington Trust, families and institutions are served with specialized capabilities that extend globally.
  • Teaming for Growth brings the full bank to every customer, deepening the relationships and communities we already serve.
Where We Are Going
We are One Bank, so every customer experiences the full strength of M&T as a single relationship.

Where We Are Going

To be the bank invited into homes, businesses, and communities by earning trust and deepening relationships with every interaction.
  • Customers should experience M&T as one bank, every time.
  • Our ambition is to be the highest-performing bank in the markets we serve, with relationships that span across generations.
  • The technology, the modernization, and the way we operate all serve a sharper customer-growth strategy that connects the right capabilities to each stage of a customer's life.
  • Our edge is quality: efficient operator and prudent steward of shareholder capital with sector-leading margin, granular low-cost deposits, and a long record of credit strength throughout cycles.
  • On technology, we invest with precision and discipline, using AI and other leading technologies to support the fundamentals and equip our people to better serve our customers and their needs.
Where We Are Going
We are building a bank that will endure for generations to come.
